description: Cloudflare rate limiting — POST /sessions/*/claims capped at 10 req/min/IP

rules.description: Rate limit claim submissions to prevent LLM abuse

response.content: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded. Maximum 10 claim submissions per minute."}

setup_instructions: Create via Cloudflare dashboard: Security > WAF > Rate limiting rules. Free tier allows 1 rate limiting rule. Or via API: POST /zones/{zone_id}/rulesets (phase: http_ratelimit)
